summary: 8 film announcements, 12 TV announcements across 5 trades.

film.title: Crush
film.announcement: Julius Avery to direct Python thriller 'Crush' for 20th Century Studios.

film.title: Broken Ones
film.talent: Terrence Howard, Guillermo Iván, Kate Bosworth
film.announcement: Terrence Howard, Guillermo Iván, and Kate Bosworth set to star in legal thriller 'Broken Ones'.

film.title: Nasty
film.talent: Rose Byrne, Jenna Ortega; Mary Bronstein (director)
film.announcement: Rose Byrne and Jenna Ortega set to star in 'Nasty' directed by Mary Bronstein for Warner Bros. Clockwork.

film.title: Ink
film.announcement: Danny Boyle's Rupert Murdoch drama 'Ink' set to open Venice Film Festival.

film.title: Paper Tiger
film.announcement: James Gray's 'Paper Tiger' set as opening night film for New York Film Festival.

film.title: The Uprising
film.announcement: Andrew Garfield to star in Paul Greengrass' historical drama 'The Uprising'.

film.title: Alpha Gang
film.announcement: The Zellners' starry sci-fi 'Alpha Gang' set for TIFF Special Presentations.

film.title: Your Mother Your Mother Your Mother
film.announcement: Mahershala Ali set for 'Your Mother Your Mother Your Mother' at TIFF Special Presentations.

tv.title: 13 Going On 30 Reboot
tv.talent: Taylor Ortega, Tim Meadows, Dan Bucatinsky
tv.announcement: Taylor Ortega, Tim Meadows, and Dan Bucatinsky join Netflix's '13 Going On 30' reboot.

tv.title: Queenstown
tv.talent: Rufus Sewell, Frances O'Connor, Alycia Debnam-Carey, Te Kohe Tuhaka; Chloe Stearns (creator)
tv.announcement: Netflix greenlights 'Queenstown' with Rufus Sewell, Frances O'Connor, Alycia Debnam-Carey, and Te Kohe Tuhaka from creator Chloe Stearns.

tv.title: Elizabeth Banks Comedy Series
tv.talent: Hamish Linklater, Michelle Buteau, Simu Liu; Elizabeth Banks (lead)
tv.announcement: Hamish Linklater, Michelle Buteau, and Simu Liu join Elizabeth Banks-led Apple comedy series.

tv.title: Enigma Variations
tv.talent: Riley Keough, Devon Terrell, Carl Clemons-Hopkins, Nicholas Podany
tv.announcement: Netflix's 'Enigma Variations' casts Riley Keough, Devon Terrell, Carl Clemons-Hopkins, and Nicholas Podany.

tv.title: This Summer Will Be Different
tv.announcement: Sophie Nélisse to star in Netflix adaptation of romance novel 'This Summer Will Be Different'.

tv.title: Conviction
tv.announcement: William Jackson Harper joins Hulu legal drama 'Conviction'.

tv.title: Robin Hood
tv.talent: James Purefoy, Colin O'Donoghue, Luke Roberts
tv.announcement: 'Robin Hood' casts James Purefoy, Colin O'Donoghue, and Luke Roberts in Season 2 as production begins.

tv.title: FX National Park Volunteer Rescue Squad Series
tv.announcement: FX and Color Force to develop series based on New Yorker article about National Park volunteer rescue squad.

tv.title: 14th
tv.announcement: Ava DuVernay returns to documentaries with Netflix's '14th' examining birthright citizenship.

tv.title: Power: Origins
tv.announcement: Starz unveils first looks at Young Ghost and Young Tommy in 'Power: Origins'.

tv.title: Pompeii: Out of Time
tv.announcement: Tom Hiddleston discusses his role in 'Pompeii: Out of Time'.

tv.title: Lucky
tv.announcement: 'Lucky' creators produced 7-episode 'blockbuster movie' for Apple TV with Anya Taylor-Joy.
